meta.title: Chonk — WooCommerce demo (Wonders & Oddities)
meta.description: WordPress + WooCommerce + Chonk, pre-loaded with the Wonders & Oddities sample shop and blog.
meta.author: RegionallyFamous

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once WC_ABSPATH.'includes/admin/importers/class-wc-product-csv-importer-controller.php'; require_once WC_ABSPATH.'includes/import/class-wc-product-csv-importer.php'; $csv=wp_tempnam('wo-products'); file_put_contents($csv, wp_remote_retrieve_body(wp_remote_get('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RegionallyFamous/wonders-oddities/main/wonders-oddities-products.csv', ['timeout'=>60]))); $fh=fopen($csv,'r'); $headers=fgetcsv($fh); fclose($fh); $mapping=WC_Product_CSV_Importer_Controller::auto_map_columns($headers,false); (new WC_Product_CSV_Importer($csv,['mapping'=>$mapping,'parse'=>true,'update_existing'=>true,'delimiter'=>',','lines'=>-1]))->import(); unlink($csv);

steps.command: wp option update show_on_front page && wp option update page_on_front $(wp post list --post_type=page --name=home --field=ids) && wp option update page_for_posts $(wp post list --post_type=page --name=journal --field=ids)
wp menu location assign main-navigation primary || true; wp menu location assign footer-navigation footer || true
